name: copilot-audio
description: Copilot CLI extension that plays synthesised music on session events

scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d=p.join(require('os').homedir(),'.copilot','extensions','copilot-audio');fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('dist/extension.mjs',p.join(d,'extension.mjs'));console.log('Deployed to '+d)"
